metadata.description: Purple geometric lightning-bolt favicon for the RAG Workbench application. A faceted crystalline shape in vibrant purple with soft light-purple elliptical accent overlays, set on a transparent background at 48x46px viewport.
A small icon associated with a website, displayed in browser tabs and bookmarks, representing site identity at a glance.
A geometric lightning-bolt motif formed by faceted triangular planes, symbolizing speed, energy, and power. In this project it evokes fast retrieval and intelligent processing.

The primary brand color used in the favicon: a vivid neon purple (#863bff). The favicon also uses a lighter tint (#ede6ff) for accent ellipses and a deeper purple (#7e14ff) for shadowed geometric facets.
The Retrieval-Augmented Generation workbench application that this favicon brands.
The web frontend for RAG Workbench, served from the frontend/ directory, which uses this favicon as its browser identity icon.
